message:
style: rustfmt long-line reformatting across 7 files

Apply cargo fmt --all to break long lines that exceeded the project's
line-length limit. No semantic changes — purely whitespace/line-break
reformatting.

Files: src/database/pool.rs, src/lab/chaos.rs, src/messaging/fabric.rs,
src/messaging/ir.rs, src/net/quic_native/forensic_log.rs,
src/runtime/state.rs, tests/ci_regression_gates.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
